brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer (A) with valid identification of the free window; only identifies the gap without exploring why each other option fails or tracing second-order constraints; no reflection on reasoning process, bias checks, or assumption questioning; no verification by testing boundary conditions or eliminating other options explicitly; states 'only unaccounted-for gap' as fact without acknowledging this conclusion depends on treating all sightings as exhaustive; does not evaluate options B, C, or D or explain why they are ruled out; shows the key constraint (2pm Eiffel Tower end, 7pm cafe start) but skips systematic elimination of all other candidate windows
